## Summary / 变更概述

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?
- 改了什么？
- 为什么需要这次改动？

## Validation / 验证情况

- [ ] App builds locally
- [ ] Relevant tests pass or skipped with explanation
- [ ] Docs/UI copy updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or personal data were introduced
- [ ] 本地构建通过
- [ ] 相关测试通过，或已说明跳过原因
- [ ] 如果行为有变化，文档和界面文案已同步
- [ ] 没有引入敏感信息或个人数据

## Notes / 备注

Add screenshots, migration notes, or follow-up items here if needed.
如有需要，请在这里补充截图、迁移说明或后续事项。
